title: IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Industrial Development Bank of India (IDBI Bank)
short_info: Industrial Development Bank of India (IDBI Bank) Part Time Doctor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IDBI Bank. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 67 years who have MBBS/MD qualification from a recognized University/College approved by the Medical Council of India in Allopathic system of medicine are eligible to apply for these Part Time Doctor vacancies. The offline application process for IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor Recruitment 2026 is currently active and will r

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 67 years.

qualification.details: Part Time Doctor: MBBS/MD from any recognized University/College approved by Medical Council of India in Allopathic system of medicine. Applicant having MD – Medicine qualifications would be preferred.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Part Time Doctor - Mumbai, Cuffe Parade
Part Time Doctor - Nerul, Navi Mumbai
Part Time Doctor - Ahmedabad, CG Road
